scripts.build: npm run build:bundle && npm run build:types
scripts.build:types: node cli/bin/pbts --main --global protobuf --out index.d.ts src/ && node cli/bin/pbts --main --import "\$protobuf=.." --out ext/descriptor.generated.d.ts ext/descriptor.js && node cli/bin/pbts --main --out ext/textformat.generated.d.ts ext/textformat.js
scripts.coverage: npm run coverage:test && npm run coverage:report
scripts.lint: npm run lint:sources && npm run lint:types
scripts.test: npm run test:sources && npm run test:types
scripts.test:types: tsc tests/comp_typescript.ts --ignoreConfig --target es2022 --module commonjs --types node --lib es2022 --esModuleInterop --strictNullChecks --strictPropertyInitialization false --experimentalDecorators --emitDecoratorMetadata && tsc -p tsconfig.test-types.json
scripts.make: npm run lint:sources && npm run build && npm run lint:types && node ./scripts/gentests.js && npm test
